task_objective: Fix redundant sudo usage in pyludusavi and refine logging to reduce noise and duplication.
design_decisions: Implemented _should_sudo helper in pyludusavi/discovery.py to skip sudo if current user matches target user.
Added diagnostic process identity logging (UID, EUID, getpass.getuser()) to sdh_ludusavi/service.py.
Refined environment logging to use DEBUG level and filter for relevant keys (PATH, HOME, DECKY_*, etc.).
Disabled log propagation for plugin loggers when DECKY_VERSION is present to prevent duplicate log entries in Decky Loader.
Updated existing tests to accommodate the extra initialization log entries.
results: Redundant sudo calls are avoided when the user is already 'deck'. Logs are cleaner, more focused, and no longer duplicated. All tests pass.
